name: Marco Rubio for President
subject: An ambitious goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41603413:16585461684:m:1:1349778030:FB02D19475E49B45789D32787362FDD4:r) |
---|---
Peter, The fundamental message of my campaign is this: If the American Dream becomes impossible for everyone but the most wealthy and well-connected, then we will have become just another country. **But if our generation rises to the challenge and ensures that the American Dream remains alive and well for EVERYONE, the 21st Century will be another American Century.** That's why I'm launching the [**Fund for the New American Century today**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41603414:16585461684:m:1:1349778030:FB02D19475E49B45789D32787362FDD4:r). We've set an ambitious fundraising goal for the next 48 hours: $100,000 for the 100 years of the new American Century. [_**Will you click here to donate now and help me launch this critical fund?**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41603414:16585461684:m:1:1349778030:FB02D19475E49B45789D32787362FDD4:r) Every dollar you give will go directly to sharing our message with the American people. As I said on Monday, this is a generational choice about what kind of country we will be. Your financial support will help us educate voters about the choice we face in this election. Please, give what you can as we take this critical next step on our campaign. Sincerely, Marco Rubio
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41603415:16585461684:m:1:1349778030:FB02D19475E49B45789D32787362FDD4:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41603416:16585461684:m:1:1349778030:FB02D19475E49B45789D32787362FDD4:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41603417:16585461684:m:1:1349778030:FB02D19475E49B45789D32787362FDD4:r)

name: Columba Bush
subject: We’re making it easier
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend,

Last week my husband Jeb announced that he will be flying one lucky winner down to Miami to have lunch with him at one of his favorite spots.

Well, I have a surprise for you. [**If you contribute $3 right now, we 'll throw in an extra ticket so you can bring a friend for the weekend as well.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1828:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

That's two free tickets, a full weekend in Miami, and Jeb will take both you and a friend of your choice to lunch at one of his favorite spots. [**All you have to do is contribute $3 and be automatically entered.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1829:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1830:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

[**Friend , this isn't an opportunity that comes along every day, so secure your chance now and chip in $3.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1831:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

And if I were you, I would start thinking about who to bring on this great trip.

Columba Bush
Former First Lady of Florida

**[P.S. Remember, the tickets, the hotel, lunch, and everything else is on us, but you have to act fast, so contribute $3 and be automatically entered now.](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1832:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)**

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1833:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)
[ ](https://www.facebook.com/jebbush) [ ](https://twitter.com/jebbush)
Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.[www.RighttoRisePac.org](www.RighttoRisePac.org)
Right to Rise PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317
[Unsubscribe](http://www.mail.righttorisepac.org/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=183&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=1)
[You can read the full sweepstakes rules here](https://www.righttorisepac.org/lunch-with-jeb-official-rules/). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by [clicking here](https://righttorisepac.org/lunch-with-jeb/). **NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE.** No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, [click here](https://righttorisepac.org/join-jeb-miami/). To enter without making a contribution, [click here]( https://righttorisepac.org/lunch-with-jeb/). Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Thursday, April 9, 2015 at 12:00 am Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Wednesday, April 22, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time on Wednesday, April 22, 2015. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) round-trip coach class plane tickets (one for the winner and one for a guest of the winner’s choice) within the continental United States on a date and to and from Destinations to be determined by Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $1,000; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the area hotels, with an approximate retail value of $175; two tickets to a local event with an approximate value of $1,000; lunch with Honorary Chairman Jeb Bush, with an approximate retail value of $50; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $50. Approximate total retail value is $2,275. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,275. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the [Official Rules]( https://www.righttorisepac.org/lunch-with-jeb-official-rules/). The Sponsor is the Right to Rise PAC. The Sponsor's address is PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317.

name: Anna Rogers, Marcorubio.com
subject: BREAKING: Every dollar matched
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41612446:16591788007:m:1:1349778030:5BF22F25F1E5D2BA45A1002329077FD5:r)
---
#
Dear Peter, A few hours ago, Marco launched the Fund for a New American Century and set the ambitious goal of raising $100,000 in the next 48 hours. Since then, a number of supporters have stepped forward and will be matching every gift that comes in for the Fund. That means when you give $10, that becomes $20. But we have to reach our goal! So please, make your donation to the Fund now: **[_> > Click here to donate $7_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41612447:16591788007:m:1:1349778030:5BF22F25F1E5D2BA45A1002329077FD5:r)** [_**> > Click here to donate $25**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41612448:16591788007:m:1:1349778030:5BF22F25F1E5D2BA45A1002329077FD5:r) _**[_> > Click here to donate $100 _](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41612449:16591788007:m:1:1349778030:5BF22F25F1E5D2BA45A1002329077FD5:r)**_ **_[_> > Click here to donate another amount_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41612450:16591788007:m:1:1349778030:5BF22F25F1E5D2BA45A1002329077FD5:r)_** I'll report to Marco in a few hours about the progress towards our goal and I want to make sure I can let him know that you've contributed towards our new Fund and helped us unlock the matching funds. Thanks for your support! Anna Rogers Finance Director Marco Rubio for President
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41612451:16591788007:m:1:1349778030:5BF22F25F1E5D2BA45A1002329077FD5:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41612452:16591788007:m:1:1349778030:5BF22F25F1E5D2BA45A1002329077FD5:r)

subject: Century fund update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41613666:16593253257:m:1:1349778030:F1A0B6A4444068F8671960A6BF97A3FA:r)
---
#
Peter, I just checked on the progress of our Century Fund and wanted to pass the update along to you: We are making good progress, but aren't quite where we need to be. **If everyone receiving this email gives $5 or more right now, we 'd reach our goal tonight.** [_**> > Click here to donate now <<**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41613667:16593253257:m:1:1349778030:F1A0B6A4444068F8671960A6BF97A3FA:r) Rich Beeson Deputy Campaign Manager Marco Rubio for President
